name: Principality of Shelk

street_level_faction_presence.street_signals: Symbols, uniform cues, work marks, and rumor shorthand make power visible in daily movement.

greetings: Measured compliments on attire are normal among strangers of equal standing.
Road-facing greetings are brisk and practical when commerce is moving.
hospitality_rules: Guests are welcomed with ordered seating, textiles, tea, or polished refreshment rather than loud abundance.
taboo_topics: publicly humiliating a host over dress or refinement
class_expectations: laborers are expected to move with purpose under Roadwarden order
faith_etiquette: woven offerings and quiet prayer conduct near shrines to Cysur, Cyfoes, Felujitas, and Felelem
suspicious_behavior: lingering near route offices without business
moving through elite districts in obvious disguise
outsider_mistakes: assuming fashion is superficial rather than civic and political

occupation_and_daily_life.daily_rhythm: Daily life turns on tailoring, road policing, market exchange, scholarly browsing, and layered public performance where refinement and utility are expected to coexist.
occupation_and_daily_life.work_rhythm_by_calendar_or_season: Freedai market rhythms, seasonal fashion cycles, and road traffic shape work more strongly than raw harvest tempo.
occupation_and_daily_life.ordinary_texture: Markets smell of dyes, pressed flowers, wool, metal polish, and cooked street food. Roads carry bells, hooves, clipped commands, and bright plume movement. Shrines feel orderly rather than ecstatic.

travel_and_transition_texture: Travel into Shelk is marked by visible route order, bright patrol signs, and the expectation that papers, cargo, and dress will be noticed.
dwelling_and_settlement_life: Homes emphasize layered fabrics, practical beauty, controlled guest spaces, and private corners for prayer or contemplation.
relationship_and_reputation_logic: People are remembered for finish, grace under pressure, reliability in trade, and whether they embarrass others publicly.
region_specific_emotional_tone: Stories in Shelk naturally lean toward elegance under pressure, social reading, soft-power rivalry, artistic ambition, and the cost of maintaining visible harmony.
